title: [ExportVerilog][Verif] 'verif.assert' op emission to Verilog not supported
body:
When I run the `check-circt` tests locally, I the below on the `Conversion/ExportVerilog/prepare-for-emission.mlir` test. For some reason, this doesn't fail in CI.

```
--
Command Output (stderr):
--
RUN: at line 1: /home/jodemme/_circt_build/bin/circt-opt /home/jodemme/circt/test/Conversion/ExportVerilog/prepare-for-emission.mlir --pass-pipeline='builtin.module(any(prepare-for-emission))' --split-input-file -verify-diagnostics | /home/jodemme/_circt_build/bin/FileCheck /home/jodemme/circt/test/Conversion/ExportVerilog/prepare-for-emission.mlir
+ /home/jodemme/_circt_build/bin/circt-opt /home/jodemme/circt/test/Conversion/ExportVerilog/prepare-for-emission.mlir '--pass-pipeline=builtin.module(any(prepare-for-emission))' --split-input-file -verify-diagnostics
+ /home/jodemme/_circt_build/bin/FileCheck /home/jodemme/circt/test/Conversion/ExportVerilog/prepare-for-emission.mlir
RUN: at line 2: /home/jodemme/_circt_build/bin/circt-opt /home/jodemme/circt/test/Conversion/ExportVerilog/prepare-for-emission.mlir -export-verilog -split-input-file
+ /home/jodemme/_circt_build/bin/circt-opt /home/jodemme/circt/test/Conversion/ExportVerilog/prepare-for-emission.mlir -export-verilog -split-input-file
within split at /home/jodemme/circt/test/Conversion/ExportVerilog/prepare-for-emission.mlir:149 offset :16:5: error: 'verif.assert' op emission to Verilog not supported
    verif.assert %k0 : !ltl.property
    ^
within split at /home/jodemme/circt/test/Conversion/ExportVerilog/prepare-for-emission.mlir:149 offset :16:5: note: see current operation: "verif.assert"(%4) : (!ltl.property) -> ()
within split at /home/jodemme/circt/test/Conversion/ExportVerilog/prepare-for-emission.mlir:256 offset :7:3: error: 'verif.assert' op emission to Verilog not supported
  verif.assert %2 : !ltl.sequence
  ^
within split at /home/jodemme/circt/test/Conversion/ExportVerilog/prepare-for-emission.mlir:256 offset :7:3: note: see current operation: "verif.assert"(%2) : (!ltl.sequence) -> ()
```

I'm running clang-10 on Ubuntu 20.04.

Extracted a split which fails.

```
hw.module @Issue5613(in %a: i1, in %b: i1) {
  verif.assert %2 : !ltl.sequence
  %0 = ltl.implication %2, %1 : !ltl.sequence, !ltl.property
  %1 = ltl.or %b, %3 : i1, !ltl.property
  %2 = ltl.and %b, %4 : i1, !ltl.sequence
  %3 = ltl.not %b : i1
  %4 = ltl.delay %a, 42 : i1
  hw.output
}
```

```
$ circt-opt issue.mlir -export-verilog
// Generated by CIRCT unknown git version
module Issue5613(       // issue.mlir:2:1
  input a,      // issue.mlir:2:25
        b       // issue.mlir:2:36
);issue.mlir:3:3: error: 'verif.assert' op emission to Verilog not supported
  verif.assert %2 : !ltl.sequence
  ^
issue.mlir:3:3: note: see current operation: "verif.assert"(%2) : (!ltl.sequence) -> ()


  unknown MLIR operation verif.assert
endmodule
```
